summary: Tested commission display-only feature: commissions now do NOT affect daily balance calculations. Verified: 1) POST /api/profit/commission with skip_deposit=true saves commission but NO deposit created (PASS), 2) Commission column shows values correctly in Daily View (PASS), 3) Total Commission card shows correct sum (PASS), 4) Balance Before progression is consistent - not affected by commissions (PASS), 5) P/L Diff excludes commission (PASS), 6) Adjust Commission dialog shows 'display-only' helper text (PASS), 7) skip_deposit checkbox removed from dialog (PASS).

issues: DialogContent console warning about missing Description for screen reader accessibility - non-blocking cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: Created test commission records with TEST_ prefix during backend testing (all with skip_deposit=true, so no deposits created)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commission display-only feature verified: 1) profitCalculations.js lines 248-253, 349, 400-403 exclude commission from balance calculations. 2) ProfitTrackerPage.jsx line 1130 always sends skip_deposit=true when saving commission. 3) Backend CommissionCreate model has skip_deposit field (line 50 profit_routes.py) - when true, commission is saved but no deposit created. 4) Adjust Commission dialog text at line 3758-3760 shows 'display-only and does not affect your account balance'. 5) Real commissions exist in Jan 2026 totaling $1,289.48 - Balance Before values are not affected.

commission_skip_deposit_true.behavior: PASS - Commission saved, NO deposit created when skip_deposit=true

commission_skip_deposit_false.behavior: PASS - Commission saved, deposit created when skip_deposit=false (legacy)

balance_before_excludes_commission.result: PASS - Balance Before is not affected by commission

pl_diff_excludes_commission.result: PASS - P/L Diff correctly excludes commission

commission_column_display.result: PASS - Commission column shows individual day commissions

total_commission_card.result: PASS - Shows correct total of all commissions for the month

adjust_commission_dialog.helper_text: Enter your total referral commission. This is display-only and does not affect your account balance.
adjust_commission_dialog.result: PASS - Dialog correctly configured for display-only behavior

monthly_table_commission.result: PASS - Commissions display correctly in monthly summary

profitCalculations.js.line_248_253: Starting balance calculation excludes commission (only sums actual_profit)
profitCalculations.js.line_349: Today's effective balance excludes commission (liveAccountValue - actualProfit only)
profitCalculations.js.line_400_403: Running balance for next day excludes commission (only adds actualProfit or targetProfit)

ProfitTrackerPage.jsx.line_1130: Commission save always sends skip_deposit: true
ProfitTrackerPage.jsx.line_3758_3760: Helper text: 'display-only and does not affect your account balance'

profit_routes.py.line_50: CommissionCreate model has skip_deposit: bool = False field
